etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = meaning related to plants, phonetic of 合 -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅(dá, "reply") combines the semantic component of 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass; plant") indicating the natural or plant-related aspect and the phonetic component 合(合) (hé, "combine") to give the sound, eventually representing the idea of a 'reply' or 'response' as if combining ideas.
